---
title: Taster sessions
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

In the week commencing 22th June 2026, we'll run a series of events designed to give you an introduction to some new tools and topics:

```{r}
KINDR::training_sessions(start_date = "2026-06-21", end_date = "2026-06-27")
```
